prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `981add89`.
codex_response:
Rule: each non-background marker in the top row defines a vertical column. In rows `1..end`, that column is rewritten to the marker color, except cells already equal to that marker color flip back to the background color.

I discarded the Opus hint because it said unrelated colors in a marked column stay unchanged; the official examples show they are overwritten. I implemented the package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_981add89/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_981add89/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_981add89/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_981add89/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator uses a sparse marker row above layered large rectangles, with both simpler and more complex layouts to stay in-family.

Validation passed: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/previews/preview_03.png). I loaded [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/981add89/previews/preview_01.png) and sanity-checked it via a terminal thumbnail fallback.
